commentary.text: Isaac Cumming is caught HTB by Lefau at the hotspot, who kicks his first goal.
Campbell roves 20m out, spins and centres to the hotspot for Green, very short kick but it's paid a mark, Green converts and Richmond leads again.
McAuliffe misses off the left after a stoppage near the hotspot.
Adelaide have pinched the lead back, an even contest all day so far.
Broad drops an intercept mark 35m out, Nick Murray stayed down and the crumb falls into his lap, he turns and grubbers through the goal.
Sonsie roves near CHB but his man Curtin mows him down from behind to win the HTB free 45m out. Curtin's kick is true.
Campbell passes to Sonsie at the hotspot on the end of a slingshot play, he converts.
Thilthorpe misses to the right from 35m on a slight angle.
Short goes long to a pack near the top of the square on a repeat inside 50, Lynch beats Borlase to mark and goal.
Rankine jinks away from Retschko on the HFF and centres for Rachele who misses from 40m.

#####The cupboard is bare at Tigerland with 17 names on the injury list, all but two of those with an estimated outage of three weeks or more. Tim Taranto returned, at least, but they decided to manage Samuel Grlj and brought in Luke Trainor.
Jordan Dawson rejoins Adelaide, but they lost Taylor Walker and Jordon Butts with Showdown injuries and brought in second-stringers to replace them.
